title: stelis naniflora
intro: Stelis naniflora, also known as the dwarf stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stelis naniflora include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Stelis naniflora are often used in traditional medicine, typically in the form of infusions or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
